Boeing Risk Profiler

Rest Profiler Review and Validate Automation

Quality control List version : 2.5 📣What's New
Prerequisites
Before validating

Open and sign in to Cairo, ESATS, and GTC in separate browser tabs first. Boeing WSSO stores the session cookies the extension needs for API requests.

  1. Sign in to Cairo and confirm the Cairo page loads.
  2. Sign in to ESATS and confirm the ESATS page loads.
  3. Sign in to GTC and confirm the GTC page loads.
  4. Return here and click Check Sessions. Green means the extension reached the target site; red means it likely hit WSSO/login or an auth error.
